context: Tests whether the agent queries the API to verify model availability before hardcoding it in config, reads auth from the correct path, checks policy.state rather than assuming availability, and uses the recommended per-command test before setting a project default.

checklist.name: API query in validation script
checklist.description: validate-model.sh fetches models from the GitHub Copilot API (via fetch-models.sh or direct curl) — not from opencode models or a hardcoded list

checklist.name: policy.state check
checklist.description: Script verifies the target model has policy.state == 'enabled' before proceeding

checklist.name: Exits on unavailable model
checklist.description: Script exits with a non-zero code or error message if model is not found or not enabled

checklist.name: Per-command test step
checklist.description: validate-model.sh or instructions include a per-command test (e.g. opencode run --model ... 'test prompt') before setting the project default

checklist.name: opencode.json defaultModel
checklist.description: opencode.json contains a 'defaultModel' key set to the target model ID
